title: Talon Tales
description: A Mainly RPG and Adventure focused Modpack, with some traces of tech and space exploration
body: A primarily adventure and RPG-focused modpack, 'Talon Tales' offers players a rich experience filled with exploration, dungeons, and Many Challenging Bosses! Alongside the main gameplay, it features elements of tech (mostly through create) and space exploration, allowing players to build advanced machinery and explore new planets. Additionally, it boasts VR compatibility, enhancing the immersive experience by allowing players to truly feel like they're soaring through the skies and exploring vast, uncharted worlds.
